title: Weber Grill Tongs (40cm), Made of Stainless Steel, with Comfort Grip and Practical Locking System, Dishwasher Safe for Easy Cleaning, with Loop for Hanging - Black (6317)
features: BBQ TONGS: These stainless steel barbecue tongs allow you to turn meats, veggies, and more with total ease - an essential staple to any chef's grilling arsenal
LOCKING MECHANISM: These grilling tongs feature a user-friendly locking mechanism in the handles which clasp the tongs together, making this tool more compact for easy storage
DISHWASHER-FRIENDLY: When these tongs get dirty, simply unlock and place them in the dishwasher with the rest of your utensils for effortless cleaning
HANGING LOOP: Keep your tongs close to hand with the convenient hanging loop at the base of the handle, and switch between cooking utensils with total ease
WEBER QUALITY: Weber has been celebrating BBQs and accessories since 1952, boasting an unmatched wealth of knowledge, experience, and passion to help you towards perfect outdoor cooking
